A '''stalking onsonker''' was (allegedly) a species of ambulatory, plantlike carnivore. [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] had a pet of the species, named "[[Fluffy (onsonker)|Fluffy]]."

Grahrk claimed he had infected [[Palpatine/Legends|Bobo]] with Fluffy's spores. According to Vilmarh Grahrk, the babies would grow out of Bobo's stomach. Fluffy sniffed out Bobo by the scent of her young, and, to brood the babies within her, ate Bobo.

Many beings had never heard of such a beast and doubted the species existed.

==Behind the scenes==
Because the species, individuals, and events described above are described only in ''The Devaronian Version'', a story told by the notably untrustworthy Vilmarh Grahrk, their levels of accuracy are uncertain.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 41|''Star Wars'' (1998) 41]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
